heroSubtitle: The design, text, and media assets on our website are available to download or stream. We have also prepared a few other helpful tools. Our heart is to share what we have so that many people will be equipped to pray for Japan.
copyrightText: We have applied a <0>Creative Commons BY-NC-ND 4.0 license</0> to all our assets. We welcome you to freely use or redistribute these resources for ministry or prayer within the parameters of the license. For other usage, please contact us beforehand. Read more about the permissions of the CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 license <1>here</1>.
byMediaAltText: TODO A picture of media types
byMediaDescriptions: The following resources are available to download by media type. Please note that clicking on the resource buttons will take you to an external website (Box or Google Drive) to download.
<0>You may also find the prayer videos here</0>.
byMediaOtherVersionText: Access the Japanese Resources page here
byTopicDescriptions: The resources are also available to download by topic. You can additionally find individual links to these resources at the bottom of each topic page.
tutDescription: Follow the instructions below to download resources on Box.
tut1Descriptions: Hover over each file you want to download and click on the "Select" box. Then click the download icon on the top right of the page.
tut2Descriptions: Your files can be found wherever you normally access downloads through your browser or computer.
referencesDescription: References and credits for this website are <0>available to view here</0>. References by topic are also available on each topic page.
title: Coming soon.
